expected_crop_source_in_product: trusted crop-cycle metadata supplied by the API request
evaluation_expected_crop_for_ood_rows: deterministic balanced simulation: sha256('expected:' + image_id) modulo maize,paddy,potato,wheat
decision: return U when a confident predicted crop differs from expected crop
otherwise restrict health decision to expected-crop healthy/disease plus invalid
return U below the validation-fitted confidence threshold

selection.primary: highest validation macro_f1 among pairs with invalid recall >= 0.80 and ID coverage >= 0.70
selection.exact_tie_break_1: highest crop-mismatch threshold, to minimize unnecessary crop-mismatch abstentions
selection.exact_tie_break_2: lowest confidence threshold, to preserve ID coverage
selection.fallback: minimum summed constraint shortfall, then highest validation macro_f1, then the same tie-breaks
